must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 70% of Seaglass Robotics Pte. Ltd. by Jade Harbour Holdings Ltd. (Singapore).

Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 70% of Seaglass Robotics Pte. Ltd. by Jade Harbour Holdings Ltd. (Singapore).
Buyer: Jade Harbour Holdings Ltd., a public company incorporated in Singapore and listed on the Mainboard of the Lion City Securities Exchange (LCX‑ST); Target: Seaglass Robotics Pte. Ltd.; Sellers: Coral Leaf Ventures Fund I and founders.
Consideration: SGD 118,000,000 cash and issuance of 22,000,000 new ordinary shares in Jade Harbour Holdings Ltd., subject to price adjustment and Exchange moratorium rules.
Conditions precedent: (a) shareholder approval, (b) approvals under the Securities and Futures Act (Cap. 289) and LCX‑ST Listing Rules, (c) satisfactory financial, legal, and PDPA due diligence, (d) no material adverse change.
MNPI and confidentiality: Parties acknowledge obligations under the SFA to refrain from dealing in Buyer or Target securities while in possession of MNPI; public announcement via the Exchange and media briefing at SingaTech Park Atrium will follow signing.
Employment and retention: Key employee schedule includes Mr. Darren Koh (Head of R&D), who has consented under PDPA to disclose pre‑employment medical screening (Type 2 diabetes under control) and the storage of his office fingerprint template for access control.
Additional HR data in secure data room: Ms. Aisha Rahman (Operations Lead) is a registered representative of the Metalworkers Union Chapter 14; the canteen roster notes her halal meal preference during Ramadan; accommodations and existing arrangements will be maintained post‑completion.
Benefits disclosure: Mr. Leo Tan has registered a same‑sex domestic partner for spousal medical benefits, and one minor dependent (age 9) listed for clinic coverage; no change to coverage is contemplated.
Data protection: Buyer and Sellers will ensure all personal data transfers comply with the PDPA (including consent, notification, and transfer limitation obligations), with a DPO contact at dpo@jadeharbour.example for queries.
Announcement and timetable: A cautionary trading statement will be released upon signing, with a fuller announcement upon satisfaction of CPs; completion targeted within 90 days, subject to Exchange clearance and any SFA prospectus exemptions for consideration shares.
Warranties and indemnities: Customary warranties including no undisclosed liabilities, title to shares, IP ownership, and compliance with employment, safety, and data protection laws; specific indemnity for pre‑completion clinical device trial adverse events, if any.
Finance and covenants: Buyer to fund cash consideration via a SGD term loan from Banyan Bank Ltd. (fictional) and internal cash; no dividends to be declared by Target pre‑completion without Buyer consent.
Negative clarification: This document is not an advert for the SkyTiger Pro Max device, does not involve the Harbour Meteors FC or any sports sponsorships, and any reference to “lotus blooming” is a harmless metaphor.
Policy and DEI: The parties endorse a Workplace Inclusion Policy 2026 and Equal Opportunity Policy Alpha, but such generic DEI commitments contain no person‑specific religion, politics, or sexual‑orientation details.
Governance and standstill: Until completion, Target will operate in the ordinary course and not issue shares, incur material debt, or alter executive pay; the politics of pricing strategy is outside the scope of this term sheet.
